About this item
+ Must-Have Soldering iron Kit: wide application tools for soldering projects, home
DIY fixing jobs, electrical, electronics, appliance repairs, circuit board welding, do-
it-yourself DIY solder applications, crafts/jewelry making. Perfect gift forall
occasions
+ Premium quality: 6OW 110V soldering iron with adjustable temperature (392
F-B42 F/200-850 C), high-performance ceramic heating element, 5 good
quality replaceable tips, heat-resistant silicone grip for maximum comfort and
reduce slippage
+ More than 20 items: soldering iron with stand and sponge, 0.8mm solder wire,
desoldering pump, 5 replaceable iron tips, solder rosin flux paste, tweezers, mini
wire stripper, mini PCB, heat shrink tubes plus downloadable ebook about
soldering
+ Durable and Convenient Carry Bag; assorted tools come handy in a durable easy-
to-carry PU bag; keeps all the components organized, easy to carry, store and
transport anywhere; everything you wanted in a home DIY do-it-yourself package
+ Satisfaction Guarantee - every purchase of this solder kt is backed by the
manufacturer's 30-day money-back / replacement guarantee and lifetime
customer support, ensuring the customers' high level of satisfaction
> See more product details

Soldering Tips and Techniques
+ Always be careful when using these tools and check the safety tps when working with soldering iron and related activities Please select a suitable temperature when soldering,
+ Lower down the temp or turn off the soldering iron wien not to be used fr longer periods of time (donot lt it be idl) to avoid damage tothe iron and tips
+ iF something unusual happens withthe product and if you are not Familiar in xing it, unplug it and do not do anything and contac seller for assistance)
Soldering Iron with Temperature Control Knob
+ Adjustable Temperature Knob - to set the optimal temperature based onthe solder alloy composition that you use
+ Four Ventilation Holes - for quick heat dissipation
+ Heat Resistant Grip - for safety when holding the soldering ion
Soldering Iron Stand With Cleaning Sponge: metal base, spring holder, cleaning sponge
Replaceable Tips Set: soldering iron tis varies in size and shape for diferent types of work
Sn Pb Wire Solder Tube: solder packaged in apen-shaped container or tube for smooth feeding ofthe solder wire during use

Customer reviews Customers say
Sette 4.6 out of 5 Customers find this soldering iron kt to be of good quality and value for money, coming with everything
needed for basic soldering and being suitable for beginners. The iron heats quickly and is easy to use,
working well for various projects and crafts. While some customers say it gets hot enough for any job,
others report it doesnt get hot enough,
